Alright, so the first sales script is called the who what why house script This is a script I use if I'm gonna have a video on a squeeze page This is a script I use I'm doing a free plus shipping offer.
This is a script I'm gonna use this is basically a script I use to get people to do Free things like opting in or registering for webinar or to buy something super super low ticket like a free plus shipping offer And maybe even up to like a seven dollar offer, but as soon as I get above about seven dollars or so I've got a shift from this script to the next one But this is what the who what high say what why house script is and down below you see some training videos explaining exactly how to use this script
